title: The First Day at Work
content: Leo felt nervous on his first day at his new job. He arrived twenty minutes early because he did not want to be late. The office was modern and full of bright lights and computer screens. His manager welcomed him warmly and introduced him to the team. Everyone seemed friendly, but Leo still felt shy. During lunch, a coworker invited him to eat at a nearby café. That simple invitation helped him feel more comfortable. By the end of the day, Leo was tired but excited about his new beginning.
